name: Easy Fruit Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
3. Heat the pie filling until boiling.
4. Pour the boiling pie filling into the prepared casserole dish.
5. Mix the remaining ingredients in a bowl until a dough forms.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto the hot pie filling, optionally sprinkling with sugar if desired.
7. Bake for about 20 minutes or until the biscuits are golden brown.
